changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE policy_reviews ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, policy_id integer DEFAULT NULL, notes text DEFAULT NULL, reviewer_id integer DEFAULT NULL, review_type integer DEFAULT NULL, review_year integer DEFAULT NULL, review_month integer DEFAULT NULL, review_day integer DEFAULT NULL, review_date timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_policy_reviews PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_policy_reviews_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_policy_reviews_to_policies FOREIGN KEY (policy_id) REFERENCES policies (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_policy_reviews_to_users_reviewer FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_policy_reviews_organization ON policy_reviews (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_policy_reviews_policy ON policy_reviews (policy_id, review_date); CREATE INDEX i_policy_reviews_policy_review_date ON policy_reviews (policy_id); CREATE INDEX i_policy_reviews_reviewer ON policy_reviews (reviewer_id);
